title: Convert start and end dates into a timeline column
excerpt: I imported my project plan over from Microsoft Project. There were two columns for start and end date, but I wish I could convert those columns into a timeline column.

posts.author: arthur.stuart (Arthur Stuart)
posts.cookedHtml: I imported my project plan over from Microsoft Project. There were two columns for start and end date, but I wish I could convert those columns into a timeline column.

posts.author: rbailey (Rachel Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: This has come up in the community a couple of times and I always get directed to this app: Start + End = Timeline - monday.com Marketplace Haven’t tried it yet, though.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can confirm that it works - Is also a 1 off payment.
